title: Earnzy
short_description: Micro-task marketplace connecting buyers and workers with real-time dashboards.
overview: Earnzy is a modern, full-stack web application for connecting buyers and workers for micro-tasks, featuring real-time dashboards, role-based access, and a beautiful, responsive UI.
features: Modern UI/UX with glassmorphism design and smooth animations
Firebase Authentication with role-based access control
Worker, Buyer, and Admin dashboards with real-time updates
Coin-based micro-task reward and payment system
React Query for optimized data fetching

title: Plantopia
short_description: Full-stack plant e-commerce platform with admin dashboard and Stripe payments.
overview: A modern, full-stack e-commerce platform for plant enthusiasts built with React, Node.js, and MongoDB.
features: Product catalog with shopping cart and checkout
User profiles with order history and wishlist
Admin dashboard for product and order management
Responsive design with search and filter

title: RelicVeil
short_description: Historical artifacts tracking platform for collectors and researchers.
overview: RelicVeil is a modern web application designed for history enthusiasts, collectors, and researchers to document, share, and discover historical artifacts.
features: Firebase authentication for secure user management
Full CRUD artifact management with detailed information

title: TalentForge
short_description: Freelance marketplace for posting, browsing, and bidding on tasks.
overview: TalentForge is a modern freelance marketplace platform where users can post, browse, and bid on tasks.
features: Post, edit, and delete freelance tasks
Browse and filter tasks by category
Bid system with full bid management

title: Logic Gates Simulator
short_description: Visual digital circuit designer with real-time simulation and analysis tools.
overview: A comprehensive Logic Gates Simulator built with Java 17, LWJGL, Slick2D, and JNA. Design, simulate, and analyze digital circuits visually with real-time feedback and advanced circuit analysis tools.
features: Basic logic gates: AND, OR, NOT, NAND, NOR, XOR, XNOR, Buffer
Sequential logic: D, JK, SR, T flip-flops
Circuit analysis: truth tables, Boolean equations, timing diagrams, K-maps
Drag-and-drop visual design with zoom and pan

title: Dizmo
short_description: Premium Apple & tech products e-commerce platform for Bangladesh's leading gadget retailer.
overview: Dizmo is a full-featured e-commerce platform for one of Bangladesh's most trusted premium tech retailers, specializing in Apple products, smartphones, laptops, tablets, smartwatches, audio gear, and accessories. The storefront handles a wide product catalog across multiple categories with flash sales, offer pages, order tracking, and multi-location store support. Built to serve a large daily customer base with a mobile-first shopping experience.
contributions: Built the entire storefront UI from scratch including homepage, product listing, product detail, and category pages
Implemented multi-category navigation with dynamic routing for Phones, Laptops, Tablets, Watches, Audio, Accessories, Gadgets, and Cameras
Developed flash sale and offers pages with countdown timers and real-time product availability
Integrated SSLCommerz payment gateway and WhatsApp-based customer support chat widget
Built order tracking system allowing customers to track orders by invoice number
Implemented store locations page and responsive mobile-first layout optimized for Bangladeshi users
Created reusable component system for product cards, banners, category grids, and promotional sections
features: Multi-category product catalog with dynamic filtering
Flash sale section with countdown timer

title: Brand Empire
short_description: Premium fashion e-commerce destination with a curated clothing catalog for the Bangladeshi market.
overview: Brand Empire is a premium fashion e-commerce platform operating out of Jamuna Future Park, Dhaka. The site offers a curated catalog of men's and women's clothing — jackets, jeans, trousers, and more — with a focus on editorial aesthetics, seasonal collections, and a seamless shopping experience. Features include wishlist management, a shopping bag, user authentication, order tracking, a studio section, and mobile app download integration.
contributions: Designed and built the full storefront UI including homepage hero sliders, featured collections, and new arrivals sections
Implemented product listing with size selectors, color variants, discount badges, and add-to-cart functionality
Built wishlist and shopping bag features with persistent state management using Redux Toolkit
Developed multi-step user authentication flow with login, signup, and account/orders access
Created editorial-style homepage with full-screen banner carousels and curated collection sections
Integrated order tracking page and returns/exchange policy flows
Added mobile app download section with QR code and App Store / Google Play deep links
Implemented payment method display supporting Visa, Mastercard, Amex, and bKash
features: Editorial homepage with full-screen hero banners and seasonal campaigns
Product catalog with size, color variants, and discount badges
Wishlist and shopping bag with persistent state
Studio section for curated editorial content
Mobile app integration with QR code download
Multiple payment method support (Visa, Mastercard, bKash)

title: Tarunya Prokashon
short_description: Bangla-language e-commerce platform for one of Bangladesh's trusted Islamic and general book publishers.
overview: তারুণ্য প্রকাশন (Tarunya Prokashon) is a fully Bangla-language online bookstore and publishing platform based in Dhaka, Bangladesh. The platform serves as the digital storefront for Tarunya Prokashon and partner publisher Sanchalon Prokashoni, offering books across 11 categories including novels, poetry, history, science, self-development, Islamic books, children's books, travel, and parenting. Features include author pages, publisher pages, book bundles, flash discounts up to 50% off, an upcoming books section, a blog, and SSLCommerz-integrated payments with bKash, Nagad, and cash-on-delivery support.
contributions: Built the entire storefront UI in Bangla language including homepage, category pages, product detail pages, and author/publisher profile pages
Implemented 11-category book navigation with dynamic routing and Bengali slugs
Developed promotional sections including weekly featured book, new arrivals, bestsellers, and Boi Mela (book fair) bestsellers
Built author and publisher directory pages with dedicated book listing views
Created book bundle/package section showcasing combo deals with savings calculations
Integrated SSLCommerz payment gateway supporting bKash, Nagad, and cash on delivery
Implemented order tracking system with invoice-based lookup
Developed blog section and FAQ accordion for customer support
Built newsletter subscription and Messenger/WhatsApp floating chat support widgets
Ensured full Bangla Unicode text rendering and RTL-compatible typography across all pages
features: Fully Bangla-language UI with Unicode support
Book bundle and combo package deals
Weekly featured book and new arrivals sections
Discount badges up to 50% off across products
SSLCommerz payment with bKash, Nagad, and cash on delivery
FAQ accordion for common customer queries
Messenger and WhatsApp floating chat support
